span.p:
Existing assets
brochures, pages, posts,
decks, webinars, calculators

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Tag each asset
role, demand state,
topic, proof type

span.p:
Weak asset
generic, product-first,
no proof, no sales use

div.style: color: rgb(124, 45, 18) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Usable asset
relevant but needs repair

span.p:
Strong asset
specific, proof-led,
sales-useful, signal-aware
